overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a mohawk and her companion walking across a rain-soaked neon-lit street in Night City. The scene features heavy rain, reflective wet pavement, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk aesthetics with teal and pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk intersection with neon hotel and digital billboards

events.description: yellow sports car drives past from left to right across the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet crosswalk with a companion, heading toward the neon-lit city center

notable_agents.action: companion in golden reflective jacket and wide-brimmed hat walking alongside the player character

entered.detail: pink neon sign reading HOTEL mounted on a dark building facade
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on rain-slicked asphalt
large digital billboard displaying a man's face with orange background
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection at night. The player character and her companion begin crossing the street, passing yellow crosswalk stripes while a yellow sports car drives through the intersection. Neon signs including a pink HOTEL sign illuminate the wet pavement, and a large digital billboard displays a man's face on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: middle of intersection with panoramic view of downtown skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: companion maintaining pace alongside, occasionally looking toward the skyline

entered.detail: towering cyberpunk skyscrapers with multiple illuminated windows and neon accents rising into the fog
massive building featuring vertical holographic advertisements with shifting pink and blue colors
small illuminated food stall with cyan lighting on the distant sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the middle of the wide intersection, with the starting side now behind. The view opens up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon billboards. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating reflections on the wet asphalt. The digital billboard that was on the right is now visible on the left as the character progresses across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching far sidewalk near digital billboard and pedestrians

events.description: reaching the far sidewalk and approaching two pedestrians standing near the billboard

agents.ego_description: completing the street crossing and approaching the sidewalk where two pedestrians are standing near the billboard

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing together near the digital billboard on the approaching sidewalk
companion continuing alongside as they reach the destination sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete curb marking the edge of the pedestrian walkway on the far side

segments.scene_description: The character completes the crossing, leaving the crosswalk stripes behind and approaching the far sidewalk. The massive digital billboard with the man's face is now prominent on the left at close range. Two pedestrians stand near the billboard waiting as the player character and companion reach the curb. The towering skyscrapers are now behind as the scene focuses on the street-level environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection that shifts from a wide street crossing to a close-up street-level perspective. It begins as the player character and her companion step onto yellow crosswalk stripes, passing a yellow sports car under the glow of a pink hotel sign and a distant digital billboard. As they reach the middle of the wide intersection, the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers draped in holographic advertisements, with the heavy rain creating vivid reflections on the asphalt. The scene then shifts as the characters complete their crossing, leaving the open intersection behind to approach the far sidewalk. Finally, the camera focuses on the street-level environment, bringing the massive digital billboard and waiting pedestrians into close range while the skyscrapers recede into the background.
